text: Snowball Edge @ mtmccis @ srwren Both Storage and Compute e Larger capacity vs Snowball ¢ 10 Gbps (RJ45), 10/25 (SFP), 45/50/100 Gbps (QSFP+) ¢ Storage Optimized (with EC2) - 80TB, 24 vCPU, 32 Gib RAM, 1 TB SSD e Compute Optimized - 100TB + 7.68 NVME, 52 vCPU and 208 GiB RAM ¢ Compute with GPU - As above .. with a GPU e Ideal for remote sites or where data processing on ingestion is needed
